name: Acolyte
description: You grew up in a religious institution and are trained in religious knowledge and prayer.

name: Acrobat
description: Your tumbling and acrobatic feats made you the star of performances.

name: Animal Whisperer
description: You have a special connection with animals and can calm even the most aggressive beasts.

name: Artisan
description: You trained as a craftsperson in a guild or workshop, learning a skilled trade from the inside out.

name: Artist
description: Your artistic talents set you apart, whether as a painter, sculptor, musician, or poet.

name: Barkeep
description: You worked at a tavern or inn, developing skills in negotiation, reading people, and mixing drinks.

name: Barrister
description: You trained in the law and have experience pleading cases and negotiating contracts.

name: Bounty Hunter
description: You tracked down criminals and fugitives for pay, honing your survival instincts and knowledge of the law.

name: Charlatan
description: You lived by your wits and fast talk, running scams and cons on the unwary.

name: Cook
description: You know how to prepare food in any conditions, turning the basest ingredients into sustenance.

name: Criminal
description: You fell in with a bad crowd and learned the ways of thievery, evasion, and underworld survival.

name: Cultist
description: You were initiated into a secret cult and participated in its strange rites and forbidden rituals.

name: Detective
description: You investigated crimes and uncovered secrets as a private investigator or constable.

name: Emissary
description: You represented a government or noble house, mastering the arts of diplomacy and political protocol.

name: Entertainer
description: You performed for crowds as an actor, musician, or traveling entertainer.

name: Farmhand
description: You grew up working the land, developing strength and an intimate knowledge of agriculture.

name: Field Medic
description: You treated wounds on the battlefield, learning medicine under pressure and in the worst conditions.

name: Fortune Teller
description: You read fortunes using cards, stars, or other divination methods, developing occult knowledge.

name: Gladiator
description: You fought in arenas for the entertainment of crowds, mastering combat and the art of intimidation.

name: Guard
description: You served as a city guard or watchman, enforcing the law and keeping the peace with authority.

name: Herbalist
description: You studied plants and their properties, creating remedies, poultices, and the occasional poison.

name: Hermit
description: You lived alone in the wilderness for years, communing with nature and developing total self-sufficiency.

name: Hunter
description: You hunted animals for food and fur, learning the ways of the wild through patient observation.

name: Laborer
description: You worked hard physical labor, developing impressive strength and endurance.

name: Merchant
description: You bought and sold goods across trade routes, developing a talent for negotiation and knowing a fair price.

name: Miner
description: You worked in mines extracting ore and precious gems, developing strength and deep underground knowledge.

name: Noble
description: Raised in a noble or aristocratic household, you were trained in etiquette, politics, and managing estates.

name: Nomad
description: Your people traveled constantly, giving you extensive knowledge of distant lands and wilderness survival.

name: Pilgrim
description: You traveled to sacred sites and shrines across the land, deepening your religious devotion.

name: Prisoner
description: You spent time imprisoned, learning the ways of criminals and how to hide from authorities.

name: Refugee
description: Forced from your homeland, you learned to survive in hostile lands without resources or allies.

name: Sailor
description: You worked aboard ships, developing strength and deep knowledge of the seas, weather, and navigation.

name: Scholar
description: You studied at a university or academy, specializing in arcane, natural, occult, or religious knowledge.

name: Scout
description: You served as a scout for an army or expedition, ranging ahead to gather information on enemy positions.

name: Servant
description: You served a noble or wealthy family, learning proper etiquette, discretion, and the inner workings of high society.

name: Street Urchin
description: You grew up on the streets, developing skills in pickpocketing and navigating the dangerous urban underworld.

name: Tinker
description: You have a knack for mechanical devices and enjoy inventing, building, and fixing things other people would discard.

name: Warrior
description: You trained as a soldier or mercenary, learning to fight and intimidate in the brutal school of military life.
